topic: Mine caura-memclaw (MemClaw — fleet memory for AI agents) for design teachings transferable to the LOCAL single-user Spec Kit Memory system. Per-teaching adopt/adapt/reject/defer verdict with risk, mapped to 027 children 002-008 or a proposed new sub-packet. Negative knowledge (what NOT to copy given arch/scale mismatch) is first-class.

orchestration.rationale: Executors run READ-ONLY analysis only; orchestrator writes all iteration/delta/state artifacts. Sidesteps the project Gate-3 executor-write HARD BLOCK, is compaction-safe, and honors the operator's standing parallel-fanout preference.

researchTarget.name: caura-memclaw (MemClaw)
researchTarget.kind: production fleet-memory system for multi-agent AI (Python; Postgres/pgvector; event-driven; MCP+REST)
researchTarget.license: Apache-2.0 (design inspiration only — no code copying)

consumer.name: Spec Kit Memory
consumer.kind: LOCAL single-user / single-tenant continuity store (SQLite index + separate vector store; ollama nomic 768d); semantic+lexical triggers; importance tiers; causal edges; FSRS decay/co-activation; self-maintaining incremental index; shadow-first learning-feedback reducers; 37-tool MCP surface
